subject: [PATCH v8 05/15] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag called VM_UFFD_RWP to provide read-write protection for userfaultfd. The flag is gated on the CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP configuration option and is currently not set or queried by any code. It extends the existing userfaultfd protection from plain write-protection (WP) to full read-write protection, trapping both reads and writes through userfaultfd. The patch also introduces new helpers for userfaultfd read-write protection and updates various files to include the new flag in their documentation and usage.
